title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在为开发者提供自动化的代码生成、调试和优化功能。它利用大型语言模型（LLM）来理解和执行编程任务，支持多种编程语言和开发环境。该项目在 GitHub 上获得了大量关注，拥有 188,831 个星标，表明其技术价值和社区影响力。OpenCode 通过智能代理技术，帮助提高开发效率，减少重复性工作，是 AI 辅助编程领域的重要开源工具。
summary_en: OpenCode is an open-source coding agent project designed to automate code generation, debugging, and optimization for developers. It leverages large language models (LLMs) to understand and execute programming tasks, supporting multiple programming languages and development environments. With 188,831 stars on GitHub, it demonstrates significant technical value and community impact. OpenCode enhances development efficiency by reducing repetitive work through intelligent agent technology, making it a key open-source tool in AI-assisted programming.
